name: Axcor Profile 400

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F7215C77-FD2B-40FB-8F2B-9AD0E9E5E5E4

comment:
The Axcor Profile 400 enhances the medium-low power category with sophisticated professional functions. It has an extraordinarily compact body (65 cm / 25½ inches high) packed with all the most advanced lighting, mechanical and electronic features. These include a professional framing system, an animation wheel, a CMY + linear CTO system, and a high precision mechanical iris.

Its light source is a 300W white LED module designed specifically for this unit. The Axcor Profile 400 comes in a 9,800 lm, 6500 K, CRI=70 model, or alternatively a 6,700 lm, 5600 K CRI=90 model.
It is extremely quiet, and has three operating modes, which can be chosen according to needs: Silent, Standard and Auto
